chunks.title: Oracle Against Ephraim and Promise to Remnant
chunks.reason: Contrasts the judgment on the proud leaders of Ephraim with the future blessing for God's remnant.

chunks.title: Judgment on Priests and Prophets
chunks.reason: Describes the spiritual confusion of religious leaders due to wine and explains God's method of judgment through foreign speech.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Jerusalem Scoffers
chunks.reason: Condemns the political leaders of Jerusalem for their false covenant with death and warns of coming destruction.

chunks.title: Parable of the Farmer's Wisdom
chunks.reason: Uses agricultural imagery to illustrate God's wise and varied discipline for His people.
